description: 验证成本预估技能：正确调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost API、参数平铺格式、模板校验修复、错误处理

evals.name: simple-ecs-cost
evals.prompt: 预估这个 ROS 模板的部署费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-k
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 192.168.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 192.168.1.0/24
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 1

evals.expected_behavior: 直接调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost，参数按 Parameters.<N>.ParameterKey/ParameterValue 平铺传递

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: params_flattened
assertions.check: 参数使用 Parameters.1.ParameterKey / Parameters.1.ParameterValue 格式平铺

assertions.name: uses_template_url
assertions.check: 通过 TemplateURL 传递模板文件路径而非内联模板内容

assertions.name: outputs_monthly_estimate
assertions.check: conclusion 中包含 monthly_estimate 和 resources 费用明细

assertions.name: no_doc_search
assertions.check: 不调用 aliyun_doc_search 或搜索定价文档

evals.name: ecs-rds-cost
evals.prompt: 预估 ECS + RDS 模板的月度费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-beijing-h
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: mysql.n2.medium.1
  DBInstanceStorageType:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 1
  Rds:
    Type: ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      DBInstanceStorageType: !Ref DBInstanceStorageType
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: '8.0'
      DBInstanceStorage: 20
      DBInstanceNetType: Intranet

evals.expected_behavior: ECS 和 RDS 的参数都通过平铺格式传入询价 API，费用明细分别列出

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: all_params_included
assertions.check: 所有 6 个参数（ZoneId、InstanceType、ImageId、SystemDiskCategory、DBInstanceClass、DBInstanceStorageType）都传入 API

assertions.name: multi_resource_breakdown
assertions.check: 费用明细中分别列出了 ECS 和 RDS 的费用

assertions.name: no_self_estimate
assertions.check: 不自行估算费用数字，完全基于 API 返回

evals.name: template-needs-fix
evals.prompt: 预估费用，模板可能有问题

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-k
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 192.168.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref NonExistentParam
      MaxAmount: 1
template_context.description: VSwitch 缺少 CidrBlock，ImageId 引用了不存在的参数

evals.expected_behavior: 先校验发现模板问题，修复（补 CidrBlock、修正 ImageId 参数引用），再询价

assertions.name: validates_first
assertions.check: 先调用 ValidateTemplate 校验模板

assertions.name: fixes_template
assertions.check: 修复了模板中的错误（VSwitch CidrBlock、ImageId 参数引用）

assertions.name: writes_back
assertions.check: 修复后将模板写回文件

assertions.name: retries_after_fix
assertions.check: 修复后重新校验或直接询价

assertions.name: template_fixed_true
assertions.check: conclusion 中 template_fixed 为 true 且包含 fix_summary

evals.name: pricing-api-failure

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-shanghai-b
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 172.16.0.0/16
  Bucket:
    Type: ALIYUN::OSS::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-test-bucket
template_context.description: 仅 VPC+OSS 的模板，OSS 可能不支持询价

evals.expected_behavior: 询价 API 可能返回错误（OSS 不支持询价），应报告错误而不编造费用

assertions.name: attempts_pricing
assertions.check: 尝试调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: reports_error_honestly
assertions.check: 如果 API 返回错误，如实报告错误原因

assertions.name: no_fabricated_cost
assertions.check: 不编造费用数据

assertions.name: error_in_conclusion
assertions.check: conclusion 中包含 error 字段说明失败原因

evals.name: ha-slb-ecs-cost
evals.prompt: 预估高可用方案（SLB + 2台 ECS）的费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-i
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.c7.xlarge
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
  EcsGroup:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      SecurityGroupId: !Ref SecurityGroup
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 2
  Slb:
    Type: ALIYUN::SLB::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      LoadBalancerSpec: slb.s1.small
      PayType: PayOnDemand

evals.expected_behavior: 正确处理多资源模板，费用明细包含 ECS（x2）和 SLB

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: includes_ecs_and_slb
assertions.check: 费用明细中包含 ECS 和 SLB 的费用

assertions.name: ecs_count_reflected
assertions.check: ECS 费用描述中体现了 2 台实例（MaxAmount=2）

assertions.name: no_terraform
assertions.check: 整个过程不涉及 Terraform 相关内容
